PERLMAN Roster

Each artist is an artist_access grant — artist-owned, scoped, revocable. Never a ranking.

artist_access.scope[]

Owns the artist relationships
Owner · artist manager

How grants work

The artist grants, the artist revokes — effective immediately. You carry the labor: prepare, stage, chase requests, watch freshness. Every truth decision — confirming facts, approving publication — stays with the artist. Exact values and artist contact details are never visible, at any scope.

Requests routed to you

Availability requests only — saves and forwards live in the reactions lane, so the inbox stays commercial.

Design system · Live Intelligence

One language: a warm night canvas, real cinematic photography, and quiet evidence with a method label. Premium and human — not a technical dashboard, not a party flyer.

Color
Night canvas#0B0C0B
Surface#14181A
Warm gold · atmosphere#F2C063
Lime · proof / action#BEE24E
Teal · developing#46DCC2
Amber · needs you#E39A4B
Type
PERLMAN · Pre-Booking Passport
Frank Ruhl Libre — headlines, artist presence
Body copy reads comfortably, with clear hierarchy and room to breathe. Bilingual by design — the same system carries Hebrew RTL.
Heebo — body, UI, navigation
PUBLIC URL PRODUCER-CONFIRMED 10+ nights

Actions
The firewall
No score · no percentile · no rank · no gauge · no scoring-radar chart. Draw is shown only as bands, binaries and method labels. The radar is a discovery universe — not a score graph. Streaming = secondary context only.

Screen map

What exists per entity, what each screen is for, the main flow, and the pain it answers — one line each, no chart libraries. Structure follows the Entity Map (v2.0): person → workspace → role, a bounded capability, and an internal console — never a flat persona list.

Entity architecture — Person → Workspace → Role
Person
Shai Perlman — ONE login. Role never lives on the person.
→
Artist workspace
Owner. Holds Acts, evidence, Passport.
→
Acts
PERLMAN · Underground By Perlman — own hero, own evidence, non-transferable.
Person
Same login, second hat.
→
Representation workspace (organization)
PERLMAN Roster — a management org with a team; agency is a workspace type, never a role.
→
Roster = grants
artist_access per artist — artist-owned, scoped, revocable. PERLMAN himself is just another grant.
Person
Same login, third hat.
→
Production workspace (organization)
INSOMNIA TLV — a company, not a role. Venue is per-EVENT (gig.venue), never bound to the brand.
→
Roles inside it
Owner · day-to-day producer · back-office viewer — one org, several people.
CapabilitySource-confirm link — one magic-link, one claim, no account, outside all navigation. Never billed, never a persona.
InternalOperator console — separate auth path, audited actions only. Never presented as a market persona alongside artist or buyer.
BillingOne person, ONE billing centre listing each workspace's plan — never charged for switching, never charged twice for being two things. Monetisation measured, not required, until the Gate-1 signal.
Who adds · who approves — the authority matrix
Every truth decision stays with the artist; everyone else prepares, proposes or reads. This table IS the product's trust story.
ActionArtistManager (rep)ProducerOperator
Add artist to roster✓ grants / acceptsrequest-only → pendingnevernever
See artist content✓ all, incl. gapswithin scope, after approval onlypublic passport onlyaudited exceptions only
Upload evidence✓upload scope — for artist reviewnever (confirms, not uploads)never
Confirm evidence facts✓ only the artistneverconfirms own statements (bounded link)never — audited pipeline review only
Prepare publication✓propose-only (AG6)nevernever
APPROVE publication✓ ONLYnevernevernever
Share passport✓ tagged linksshare scope✓ public linknever
Revoke access✓ always, immediatewithdraw own siden/aaudited suspension only
Artist · Shai Perlman (PERLMAN)Pays — artist plan · measured, not forced at Gate-1
Pain (assumption): real selling force invisible in EPKs → get booked on visible, credible proof.
Arrive — setup ON the Radar
No separate onboarding screen. The universe starts dim; jobs question, claim-your-act and source-connect are staged on it — the scan makes it blossom.
→
Radar
His evidence universe — also where found items get confirmed. Act-switch at the center-star; workspace-switch top-right.
→
Confirm panel
Overlay mode of the Radar — preview, approve, edit-wording or dismiss real sources
→
Passport
What publishes — versioned, with a live-link receipt; gaps stay private
→
Requests
Real manager reactions — open the world, reply, get a receipt
→
Share loop ✦
Shares the producer's ticket link stamped with his code — attributed sales return as a ✦ found candidate to confirm into the passport

Requests routed

DynamicsWhat flows between Shai's three workspaces: grants · requests · confirmations · public passports. What NEVER crosses: evidence between Acts or workspaces (per-Act, non-transferable) · claim.exact_value & artist.contact (never visible at any scope) · merged permissions on switch · artist-vs-artist comparison (banned crossing). INSOMNIA booking a rep-roster artist ⇒ producer_confirmation.conflict_of_interest disclosed.

Demo storyRoster: request Idan Raz → row goes PENDING, locked ("no content visible") → switch to the artist workspace (top-right) → account ▾ → Representation → approve the incoming request with scopes (simulating Idan's view) → switch back: the row is ACTIVE with exactly those scopes → open PERLMAN's value view → Propose publication update (AG6) → switch to the artist workspace → Passport → Approve & publish. Every hop is one tap on the context switcher.
